title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'testuser' in the 'Username' field | Enter 'testpass' in the 'Password' field | Click on the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and redirected to the main content area

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'invaliduser' in the 'Username' field | Enter 'invalidpass' in the 'Password' field | Click on the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials

title: Login with empty fields
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing

title: Toggle 'Keep me logged in' checkbox
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'testuser' in the 'Username' field | Enter 'testpass' in the 'Password' field | Toggle the 'Keep me logged in' checkbox | Click on the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and the 'Keep me logged in' checkbox is checked

title: Forgot password link functionality
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'testuser' in the 'Username' field | Click on the 'Forgot Password?' link
expected_result: The user is redirected to the password reset page

title: Login with 'Keep me logged in' checkbox unchecked
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'testuser' in the 'Username' field | Enter 'testpass' in the 'Password' field | Click on the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and the 'Keep me logged in' checkbox is unchecked

title: Login interruption and resume
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Enter 'testuser' in the 'Username' field | Enter 'testpass' in the 'Password' field | Click on the 'Sign In' button | Simulate an interruption (e.g., force close the app) | Resume the app and check if the user is still logged in
expected_result: The user is still logged in successfully
